description: Perform Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) unit root tests on the 'usa.gdt' dataset. Conduct an ADF test on 'gdp' in levels using 4 lags with a Constant and Trend. Conduct an ADF test on the first difference of 'gdp' using 4 lags with a Constant only. Conduct an ADF test on 'inf' in levels using 4 lags with a Constant only. Save the results of all three tests to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/adf_results.txt.

metadata.data_source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis FRED database (via Principles of Econometrics 5th Ed)
